description: You are a Development Director for a non-profit organization. Identify three open federal funding opportunities on Grants.gov using the keyword 'rural health' and the eligibility filter 'Nonprofits having a 501(c)(3) status with the IRS, other than institutions of higher education'. Bookmark the 'View Opportunity' pages for these three grants in a folder named 'Grant Prospects'. Compile the details (opportunity_number, title, agency, posted_date, and close_date) for these opportunities into a JSON file at '~/Documents/grant_prospects.json'.
